words.example_sentence_target: Le score final est de quatre-vingt-un.
words.example_sentence_native: The final score is eighty-one.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Luh score fee-nal eh duh kat-ruh-van-uh.

words.example_sentence_target: Le billet coûte quatre-vingt-cinq euros.
words.example_sentence_native: The ticket costs eighty-five euros.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Luh bee-yay coot kat-ruh-van-sank uh-ro.

words.example_sentence_target: La limite est de quatre-vingt-dix kilomètres par heure.
words.example_sentence_native: The limit is ninety kilometers per hour.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: La lee-meet eh duh kat-ruh-van-deess kee-lo-met-ruh par ur.

words.example_sentence_target: Mon grand-père a quatre-vingt-deux ans.
words.example_sentence_native: My grandfather is eighty-two years old.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Mon grahn-pair ah kat-ruh-van-duh ahn.

words.example_sentence_target: Il y a quatre-vingt-huit touches sur un piano.
words.example_sentence_native: There are eighty-eight keys on a piano.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Eel y ah kat-ruh-van-weet toosh soor uh pya-no.

words.example_sentence_target: Le numéro de la chambre est le quatre-vingt-onze.
words.example_sentence_native: The room number is ninety-one.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Luh new-may-ro duh la shahm-bruh eh luh kat-ruh-van-ohnz.

words.example_sentence_target: J'ai obtenu un score de quatre-vingt-quinze.
words.example_sentence_native: I got a score of ninety-five.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Jhay ob-ten-oo uh score duh kat-ruh-van-kanz.

words.example_sentence_target: Il y a cent centimètres dans un mètre.
words.example_sentence_native: There are one hundred centimeters in a meter.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Eel y ah sahn sahn-tee-met-ruh dahn uh met-ruh.

words.example_sentence_target: L'année était mille neuf cent quatre-vingt-douze.
words.example_sentence_native: The year was nineteen ninety-two.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Lan-nay ay-tay meel nuhf sahn kat-ruh-van-dooz.

words.example_sentence_target: Cela coûte quatre-vingt-dix-neuf centimes.
words.example_sentence_native: It costs ninety-nine cents.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Suh-la coot kat-ruh-van-deez-nuhf sahn-teem.

words.example_sentence_target: Il y a cent un dalmatiens.
words.example_sentence_native: There are one hundred and one dalmatians.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Eel y ah sahn uh dal-ma-syen.

words.example_sentence_target: Le billet d'avion coûte deux cents euros.
words.example_sentence_native: The plane ticket costs two hundred euros.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Luh bee-yay da-vyon coot duh sahn uh-ro.

words.example_sentence_target: Il y a mille raisons de visiter Paris.
words.example_sentence_native: There are a thousand reasons to visit Paris.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Eel y ah meel ray-zohn duh vee-zee-tay Pa-ree.

words.example_sentence_target: L'événement a eu lieu en l'an deux mille.
words.example_sentence_native: The event took place in the year two thousand.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Lay-ven-mon ah ew lyuh ahn lahn duh meel.

words.example_sentence_target: La ville a plus d'un million d'habitants.
words.example_sentence_native: The city has over a million inhabitants.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: La veel ah ploos duh mee-lyon da-bee-tahn.

words.example_sentence_target: C'est la première fois.
words.example_sentence_native: This is the first time.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Say la pruh-myair fwah.

words.example_sentence_target: Prenez la deuxième rue à droite.
words.example_sentence_native: Take the second street on the right.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Pre-nay la duh-zyem roo ah drwaht.

words.example_sentence_target: Il est arrivé en troisième position.
words.example_sentence_native: He finished in third place.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Eel eh ah-ree-vay ahn trwah-zyem po-zee-syon.

words.example_sentence_target: C'est le quatrième étage.
words.example_sentence_native: It's the fourth floor.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Say luh ka-tree-em ay-tazh.

words.example_sentence_target: C'est le dernier jour des vacances.
words.example_sentence_native: It's the last day of the holidays.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Say luh dair-nyay joor day va-kahns.

words.example_sentence_target: Je bois du café le matin.
words.example_sentence_native: I drink coffee in the morning.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Zhuh bwah dew ca-fay luh ma-tan.

words.example_sentence_target: Nous allons au parc l'après-midi.
words.example_sentence_native: We go to the park in the afternoon.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Noo za-lon oh park la-preh-mee-dee.

words.example_sentence_target: Je lis un livre le soir.
words.example_sentence_native: I read a book in the evening.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Zhuh lee uh leev-ruh luh swar.

words.example_sentence_target: Les étoiles brillent la nuit.
words.example_sentence_native: The stars shine at night.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Lay zay-twal breey la nwee.

words.example_sentence_target: Il est minuit.
words.example_sentence_native: It is midnight.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Eel eh mee-nwee.

words.example_sentence_target: Je commence le travail lundi.
words.example_sentence_native: I start work on Monday.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Zhuh co-mohns luh tra-vai luhn-dee.

words.example_sentence_target: Nous avons une réunion mardi.
words.example_sentence_native: We have a meeting on Tuesday.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Noo za-vohn zewn ray-ew-nyon mar-dee.

words.example_sentence_target: Le marché est ouvert le mercredi.
words.example_sentence_native: The market is open on Wednesday.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Luh mar-shay eh oo-vair luh mair-kruh-dee.

words.example_sentence_target: Je vais au cinéma jeudi.
words.example_sentence_native: I am going to the cinema on Thursday.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Zhuh vay oh see-nay-ma jhuh-dee.

words.example_sentence_target: C'est enfin vendredi !
words.example_sentence_native: It's finally Friday!
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Say ahn-fan vahn-druh-dee!

words.example_sentence_target: Je fais les courses le samedi.
words.example_sentence_native: I do the grocery shopping on Saturday.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Zhuh fay lay coors luh sam-dee.

words.example_sentence_target: Le dimanche, je me repose.
words.example_sentence_native: On Sunday, I rest.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Luh dee-mahnsh, zhuh muh ruh-poz.

words.example_sentence_target: Aujourd'hui, il fait beau.
words.example_sentence_native: Today, the weather is nice.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: O-zhoor-dwee, eel fay bo.

words.example_sentence_target: À demain !
words.example_sentence_native: See you tomorrow!
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Ah duh-man!

words.example_sentence_target: Hier, j'étais fatigué.
words.example_sentence_native: Yesterday, I was tired.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Yair, jhay-tay fa-tee-gay.
